title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Country Delight - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Country Delight - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Digital Marketing Manager with drive and ambition, Country Delight in Chandigarh is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Country Delight:
Country Delight is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Country Delight!
